description: Frozen public OSS TypeScript/JavaScript onboarding corpus generated on 2026-07-18. This is an infer-manifest onboarding study, not a precision corpus.

queries.label: typescript
queries.query: language:TypeScript stars:>=500 archived:false fork:false size:<50000 sort:stars-desc

queries.label: javascript
queries.query: language:JavaScript stars:>=1000 archived:false fork:false size:<50000 sort:stars-desc

constraints: exact default-branch HEAD commit recorded before running
selectionPolicy.safety: Static CellFence checks only; no target dependency installation, package scripts, PRs, or issues.
selectionPolicy.interpretation: manifest.strategy=infer results measure onboarding and detector pressure only; they are excluded from precision denominators until reviewed manifests exist.
